title: Sour Gooey Cozy Tunisian Bread Flour Stir-fry
description: A diabetic-friendly, sour and gooey bread flour dish that's perfect for a cozy breakfast or snack. It’s cooked in a pressure cooker to ensure everything is perfectly tender.
instructions: In a bowl, mix bread flour, eggs, yogurt, sour cream, flax seeds, honey or agave syrup, vanilla extract, and a pinch of sea salt. Mix well until smooth.
Grease the pressure cooker with a bit of olive oil if you have one to prevent sticking.
Pour the mixture into the pressure cooker and secure the lid. Cook on high for 25 minutes on manual setting or until done according to your appliance's instructions.
After cooking, allow it to sit for about 5-10 minutes before serving.
Sprinkle a pinch of paprika over the top for extra flavor.
